title: cirsium × fabium
intro: Cirsium × fabium, also known as the meadow thistle or cotton thistle, is a hybrid plant species that combines characteristics from Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium arvense, resulting in a unique and versatile plant. The medicinal properties of Cirsium × fabium lie in its leaves, stems, and flowers, which contain compounds like saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Cirsium × fabium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
